info.name: Perforated Classification
info.description: A drop-in replacement for the Classification block with Dendritic Optimization, a biologically-inspired technique that improves learning capacity with fewer parameters. Use it to hit higher accuracy at the same model size, or maintain accuracy with a smaller model.

parameters.name: Learning rate
parameters.help: How fast the neural network learns, if the network overfits quickly, then lower the learning rate.

parameters.name: Auto Weight Classes
parameters.help: Automatically weight classes based on sample counts to handle class imbalance.

parameters.name: Dendritic Optimization
parameters.help: Controls whether dendritic optimization should be applied.

parameters.name: Speed Switch
parameters.help: Controls the speed to switch. Fast = 10 epochs, extra-slow = 250 epochs

parameters.name: Improvement Threshold
parameters.help: Improvement cutoff to add dendrites, low switches after full plateau, high switches earlier

parameters.name: Improved Dendritic Optimization
parameters.help: Train dendrites with correlation-based optimization for better performance with the same final architecture.

parameters.name: Perforated AI Login Email
parameters.help: Your email address for PerforatedAI login.

parameters.name: Split test set
parameters.help: Split test set into validation and test. If false, uses full test set for validation.

parameters.name: 0 - Reshape Columns
parameters.help: Number of columns (freq bins) to reshape the flat input into. E.g. 13 for MFCC, 40 for motion spectral features.
